name: Credit Human | Woodlawn Financial Health Center
description_short: Credit Human is a credit union operating a Woodlawn branch in San Antonio, TX, offering member banking services including accounts, loans, and ATM access with extended hours.
description_long: Credit Human is a federally-chartered credit union providing financial services to members in the San Antonio, Texas area, with the Woodlawn Financial Health Center located at 1003 Bandera Rd, Suite 101. As a credit union rather than a traditional bank, Credit Human operates on a member-owned cooperative model and offers standard banking products and services to its membership. The Woodlawn branch provides both lobby and drive-up access with extended weekday hours and weekend availability, making it accessible to members with varying schedules. The facility includes an on-site ATM and bilingual staff support, reflecting the demographic needs of the San Antonio community. Credit Human distinguishes itself through its credit union structure, which typically means lower fees and member-focused policies compared to for-profit banks. The organization maintains dedicated phone support through their Member Service Center with specific hours and a toll-free number. However, as a credit union, membership eligibility requirements may apply, and the website content does not specify loan products, rates, or account types in detail. The Woodlawn location appears to be one of multiple branches, suggesting an established regional presence. Overall, Credit Human functions as a conventional financial institution serving its membership base rather than serving as a specialized lending platform. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Extended drive-up hours (7 am - 6 pm Monday-Friday, 9 am - 2 pm Saturday) for member convenience
Weekend lobby hours including Saturday 9 am - Noon for working members
On-site ATM access available at the Woodlawn location
Bilingual staff (Se Habla Español) serving the San Antonio community
Dedicated Member Service Center available Monday-Friday 7 am - 7 pm and Saturday 9 am - 12 pm
Toll-free and local phone support options (800-688-7228 and 210-258-1234)
Online appointment scheduling available for member convenience
cons: Website does not disclose specific loan rates, making rate comparison difficult for prospective members
Membership eligibility requirements likely apply but are not detailed on this location page
Limited information about specific account types, features, or deposit insurance details
No information provided about online banking capabilities or mobile app features
Website does not specify loan types available (personal, auto, home, etc.) or maximum loan amounts
best_for: San Antonio-area residents seeking a credit union alternative to traditional banks
Spanish-speaking consumers who benefit from bilingual staff support
Members needing extended banking hours including weekend lobby access
diagnosis: Credit Human Woodlawn is best for San Antonio-area residents already familiar with credit unions or seeking member-focused banking with extended weekend and early-morning hours. The main caveat is that the website provides minimal detail about specific products, rates, and membership eligibility—prospective members must contact the branch or call the Member Service Center for detailed product information and rate quotes.
services: Checking and savings accounts (referenced via 'new account' option)
Loan products and loan payment services (referenced but not detailed)
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
